name: Crystal Cove Glass TV Stand for TVs up to 59" - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
The Crystal Cove Glass TV Stand from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee gives your entertainment space a light and airy look. Featuring a rectangular silhouette, this TV stand has a smooth tabletop that can accommodate up to a 59-inch TV. It has two cabinets with shelves to offer you plenty of organization space, and each cabinet is designed with double doors featuring clear glass panes, gold-tone pull knobs and cord management holes at the back for added convenience and flair. The design is finished with a striking contrast of light brown woodgrain-look shelves and back, as well as a black metal frame.
Overall width: 60 inches
Overall depth with handle : 16.37 inches
Overall depth without handle : 15.5 inches
Overall height with floor leveler: 28.25 inches
Overall height without floor leveler: 28 inches
Cabinet inner height :22.55inch
Shelf inner depth : 13.89inches (same size at both right and left)
Bottom panel inner space : 29.41 inches (same size at both right and left)
